title: eltroplectris longicornu
intro: Eltroplectris longicornu is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as the long-horned milkweed vine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the nervous system and act as a sedative. The health benefits of Eltroplectris longicornu include its potential to reduce anxiety and insomnia, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and crushing the leaves and stems, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
